channel.title: Any on Luigi Minardi
channel.description: Recent content in Any on Luigi Minardi

item.title: How to self-host minecraft safely with port forwarding
item.description: Setting up a minecraft server without exposing your machine to the internet by port forwarding.

item.title: How to use UV when you are used to PIP
item.description: From installing to using UV as your venv and python manager in an existing pip project.

item.title: How to make a blog
item.description: How can you make a blog just like this one using Hugo and Congo

item.title: The Blog
item.description: This is my little corner of the internet, welcome! Now lets go to why I did it, and what you should expect to see here.

item.title: How to use Docker on Mac Silicon
item.description: Setting up docker in mac without Docker Desktop nor headaches.
